title: Preserve error type information in classifyHTTPError
body:
## Context

From PR #223 code review (fingerprint: `048e2bec8f68ffa396a6eff76841f47b`)

## Problem

`classifyHTTPError` in `internal/adapter/llm/simple/anthropic.go` returns wrapped errors but loses the original error type information. This makes it harder to distinguish between different network error scenarios (timeout vs connection refused vs DNS failure).

## Suggested Improvements

1. Preserve the original error using `errors.Unwrap` support
2. Use `errors.Join` to maintain the error chain while adding classification
3. Consider a custom error type that embeds the original error

## Priority

Low - current retry logic works correctly despite this.

## Related

- PR #223: Theme extraction feature
